mapper.insert: insert into orders (number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, order_type, table_no, rider_id, delivery_zone_code, coupon_id, coupon_amount, actual_pay_amount, amount, remark, user_name, phone, address, consignee, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, pack_amount, tableware_number, tableware_status) values (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{orderType}, #{tableNo}, #{riderId}, #{deliveryZoneCode}, #{couponId}, #{couponAmount}, #{actualPayAmount}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{consignee}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryTime}, #{packAmount}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus})
